description_long: This is a large, robust African elephant with a thick, wrinkled gray hide and prominent tusks curving outward from its face. Its ears are broad and fan-shaped, extending out from the sides of its head, and its trunk is long and flexible, hanging down in front. The body is massive and barrel-shaped, supported by four sturdy, pillar-like legs. The tail is relatively short and tapers to a tuft at the end. The surface texture is rough and matte, with visible folds and creases typical of elephant skin. The overall appearance is lifelike, with naturalistic proportions and anatomical details.
description: A large, gray African elephant with wrinkled skin, long tusks, and broad ears. Its body is massive and supported by four sturdy legs.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the broad back, thick legs, and short tail with a tuft.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the body, trunk, and both tusks.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the wide ears, long trunk, and both tusks prominently.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the body, trunk, and tusks from the opposite side.
